name: tpi-channel-direct
description: Direct-channel index. Same 16 ATPI members, selectors restricted to hyperscaler='direct' (the model provider's own published API — e.g. anthropic.com, openai.com, xai.com, moonshot.cn). Members not available via a direct provider API are unresolved; the geometric mean computes over those that are. Of ATPI's 16, 13 resolve here; the 3 unresolved (Gemini 3.5 Flash, GLM 5.1, DeepSeek V4 Flash) demonstrate that some frontier-tier providers do not yet expose a direct first-party API and are aggregator-only in our catalog.
selection_rule: ATPI 16 members, hyperscaler == 'direct' filter (first matching record per family)

members.label: Gemini 3.5 Flash
members.note: No direct hyperscaler record in our catalog — Gemini 3 Flash Preview is only available via aggregator/GCP. Expected to be unresolved.

members.label: GLM 5.1
members.note: Z-AI does not yet expose a direct API in our catalog (only via aggregators). Expected to be unresolved.

members.label: DeepSeek V4 Flash
members.note: DeepSeek has no direct provider record in our LiteLLM source — only aggregator. Expected to be unresolved.
